description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to build on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) and Python versions (3.8-3.12, 3.13, pypy-3.10), excluding certain combinations. For each job, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies, build a wheel package, run tests with pytest, and upload build artifacts to ubuntu-latest with Python 3.13.
